name: Eve
text: Great games and layout! I like the Calibri font.

name: Tom R.
text: Great Games! But maybe stop doing so much MAINTENANCE!

name: John Deer
text: Awesome experience overall! That includes the games.

name: Sophie
text: Good but needs more updates. And try and put a waiting game on the maintenance screen!

name: Angus B.
text: Can we put in a chat room!? I NEED TO CHAT TO MY FRIEND!!
